description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The element "voting-communication metrics" refers to the percentage of votes for which an Aligned Delegate provides the required written explanations or justifications of their casted votes in Governance Polls and Executive Votes. These written explanations are posted in the AD
The Target Document’s function is to ensure that SKY holders delegating to the AD have full transparency to understand the AD

The element "voting-communication metrics" refers to the percentage of votes for which an Aligned Delegate provides the required written explanations or justifications of their casted votes in Governance Polls and Executive Votes. These written explanations are posted in the AD's Forum thread.
The Target Document’s function is to ensure that SKY holders delegating to the AD have full transparency to understand the AD's decision-making process.
description: Extra spaces have been removed. --- The following have been kept unchanged: - Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of: - Line-final spaces - Interlinear spaces - Table layouts excepting the removal of: - Line-final spaces Newlines have not been changed.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
